programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con el inicio de las vacaciones, los shores se juntan para dar la bienvenida a los nuevos miembros de la familia. Alba se encuentra cara a cara con Diego y Karime, mientras que Chile toma la decisión de hacer justicia con el ladrón de sus frases.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío se une al grupo con ganas de venganza. Santiago y Alba sorprenden a todos con una ceremonia poliamorosa. Diego no puede controlar su bebida y su forma de festejar le pasa factura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta sigue, pero Diego toma una decisión sorprendente. Jaylín se une al grupo y, mientras su bienvenida se descontrola, Karime organiza la primera iniciación en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La iniciación de Alba concluye con éxito, pero Jacky aprovecha a Altafulla para incomodarla. Una nueva invitada llega a la casa y Carlos queda cautivado por su encanto, mientras que José y Beni se enfrentan por la atención de Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los conflictos entre Alba y Altafulla se intensifican. Chile y Beni compiten por llevar a una invitada al despacho. Jacky, tras pasarse de copas, toma una decisión que transformará su relación con Altafulla.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky confronta a todos en la casa para exigir la expulsión de Altafulla. Karime organiza una cita muy mexicana con la intención de espantar a José. Un invitado sorprende a todos, especialmente a Chile y Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Jey a la casa revive pasiones olvidadas en Jacky. Una nueva invitada llega con la intención de sabotear la relación entre Rocío y Santiago, mientras que dos invitadas deciden dejar la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Second and last episode recapping the season's best moments, commented by the Shore cast. With unedited scenes and cast members uncovering truths that will leave us all speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Proof of True Love
programme.desc: The old Shores meet the new generation, and together, they take the vacation of a lifetime. But the beginning will be different for everyone, especially for Mane and Jawy.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Aunt Brenda
programme.desc: In the midst of general uncertainty due to Mane not being around and the lack of connection between Potro and Danik and Jawy and Gaby, the Shores will receive the most unexpected visit.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Queen is Back
programme.desc: At the house, things with Brenda are flowing, the new members are getting more and more comfortable and the vacation is going well. The Shores can't wait for Mane to arrive and to see what happens between Jawy and Gaby.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Wandering Knight Victor
programme.desc: The life of a hot guy isn't easy; Victor should know because he keeps getting into one problem after another.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Go for It!
programme.desc: Joined by the De La Espriella twins, the Shores travel to Medellin. Not even the good news about the trip can keep Mane and Julian's past from affecting the Chikis' relationship.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Aguardiente Shore
programme.desc: The Shores enjoy a crazy night in Colombia. They say goodbye to Medellin as they return to the Riviera, where they receive another surprise.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Coastal Pin&%$
programme.desc: Tadeo's visit brings a breath of fresh air to the house, although it's short-lived and the debauchery prevails.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Pact
programme.desc: The Riviera is on fire and the Shore group can't catch a break. In the middle of it all, Potro and Karime sign a pact to maintain the peace in their friendship.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Antonio Leaves
programme.desc: Due to problems with his family in Mexico, Tony decides to leave the house. When Tadeo realizes there is a free room, he changes his schedule and announces to the group that he will be staying for the rest of the vacation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Letters
programme.desc: Mane and Jawy's relationship is hanging by a thread. Despite their love, they will say things to each other that are difficult to forgive.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Caguamero Banquet
programme.desc: Letters, pacts, galas, punches and other things don't let the group realize the obvious, the vacation is ending.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: What I Leave and What I Take
programme.desc: The vacation has come to an end and the Shores say goodbye without knowing if they will ever be together again, but they're sure that they had an unforgettable vacation.

programme.desc: Zushi's mentor, Wing, tells Gon and Killua about the existence of something known as Nen.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: In order to break down Hisoka's Nen barrier, Gon and Killua ask Wing to let them awaken their Nen abilities.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon's first battle in the Heaven's Arena on the 200th story is against Gido, a Nen user.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo paralyzes Kagome. Inuyasha appears before her. Kikyo has been gathering the souls of dead girls.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango, a demon slayer, is invited to Hitomi Castle along with her father, the leader of the demon slayers, and her younger brother, Kohaku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango fights Inuyasha, believing him to be her enemy. Naraku's plan is to have her fight to the death using the power of the Shikon Jewel shard.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango reveals the secret story of the Shikon Jewel's birth.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and the gang meet Taromaru, the son of a village leader. They go to the Temple of the Water God, where children are being sacrificed.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: A demon injures Miroku's Wind Tunnel. Miroku visits the temple of Mushin, the man who raised him, for help treating the injury.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango's younger brother, Kohaku, who's supposed to be dead, is alive.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango steals the Tetsusaiga and is led to Naraku's castle. Sango tries to use the opportunity to kill Naraku.

programme.title: Death Note: Performance
programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance
programme.desc: Misa succeeds in narrowing down the Kira suspects in the Yotsuba Group to one: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note: Frenzy
programme.desc: Higuchi of the Yotsuba Group attempts to kill Matsuda of the task force, and is surprised when he doesn't die after 40 seconds.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a brand-new series as Thomas Plant and Philip Serrell team up for a 700-mile trip beginning in Lancashire and the Isle of Man.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell thinks "big is best" on his shopping trip with rival expert Thomas Plant as they journey from York to Rotherham in search of a bargain.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant gets to ride in a special classic car and Philip Serrell has his eye on a unique lady, as they make their way through the Peak District.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the fourth leg of their road trip, Thomas Plant has a brush with showbiz and Philip Serrell takes a fancy to some gym equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Philip Serrell and Thomas Plant make some unlikely purchases on their last road trip and face a nail-biting finale at auction in Greenwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip as savvy antiques aficionados Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw pit their expertise against each other on their journey from Lancashire to Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw buys some nightmarish figures and Mark Stacey goes retro as the boys travel across the country in style on the second leg of their trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip, Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw start their shopping in Stafford and finish with a nail-biting auction in Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw gets a peek into the life of the royals and Mark Stacey learns about Pomp and Circumstance on the fourth leg of their road trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two antiques experts Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw play with boats and helicopters as they storm towards the finishing line of this road trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip and antiques experts James Lewis and James Braxton kick off at Ampthill in Bedfordshire and head for Market Harborough with the popular hymn Amazing Grace ringing in their ears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their trip James Braxton and James Lewis travel around Oxfordshire in their classic car in search of bargains to sell at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roadtrippers James Braxton and James Lewis head south to the sunshine of Jersey and get a taste of Island life on the third leg of their journey.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the fourth leg of their trip James Braxton learns about Faversham's "explosive" history and his opponent James Lewis settles for a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Jorge llama a Marcia al hospital para pedirle perdón y decirle que la ama. Valeria le da una lección a Horacio para demostrarle que ella no es como el resto de las mujeres que él conoce.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a personal tragedy, the former punk rocker and owner of the Triple Nickel Tavern nears rock bottom, but Jon's patience only goes so far.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings his team to The Palace, a Moroccan-themed bar and restaurant in Upland, CA, where one owner puts the business at risk by drinking the inventory and refusing to try new ideas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon wants to save the mice-infested, touristy Fort One Bar & Lounge, he'll need to get the spoiled owner who was gifted the bar to stop taking it for granted.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings in culinary expert Aaron McCargo Jr. and mixologist Mia Mastroianni to help a Florida couple's bar bounce back after years of failure under their son's management.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Albuquerque, New Mexico, to help Commander Rudy and his staff recruit young veterans to become members and inject new life into his VFW Post 6216 bar and hall.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In order to save a failing Queens dive, Jon has to quell the raging tempers of three loudmouthed, firefighting brothers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After giving their artsy, irresponsible landlord a share of the bar, the brothers behind Martini Brothers Burger Bar are at their wits' end and ready to call Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes head-to-head with a stubborn owner and self-proclaimed nightlife expert who's resistant to implementing any changes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon needs to change the attitude of a crass bartender and tweak the grisly decor if he hopes to save the Las Vegas goth bar The Underworld.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon faces a staff mutiny at Piratz Tavern when he forces the suburban Washington, D.C., bar to start catering to the city's professional clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A third-generation Milwaukee bar owner takes his father's legacy for granted and refuses to take on the inherited mantle of leadership.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A riverside bar in Florida is struggling to stay afloat due to a manager with no experience, a staff co-mingling, and a wildly out of line menu for their community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After convincing his friends to invest their life savings, the rookie bar owner of Cirivello's has turned a community staple into a money pit and now faces a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Veteran lifeguard Jack 'JD' Darius has a dark secret in his past. He comes to Baywatch to throw his rescue can in the ring for the open Lieutenant slot, but young and ambitious Taylor Walsh also wants the job, and she's ready to fight for it.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch, Sky, and April find a dead man on the ocean floor. Their search for answers to his demise leads to the retirement home where he lived, and his two friends who seem to be hiding the true story. The chemistry between Cody and Lani heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April is devastated by her younger brother Charlie’s terminal illness. Mitch and Hobie want to make sure Charlie's wishes are granted, and that the time he spends with the lifeguards at Baywatch is the best of his life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's acting career isn't going well so she returns to Baywatch to figure out what she really wants to do with her life. The lifeguards are plagued by a sleaze-ball helicopter reporter who somehow knows intimate details about their love lives.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After the devastation of the last big L.A. earthquake, Baywatch lifeguards are taking recent Seismic activity seriously. Caroline and JD 's tempestuous relationship heats up, forcing Caroline to make a critical decision that could change her life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The hot Santa Ana winds blow an air of mystery to Baywatch when two sea lions perish in an unexplainable event. Mitch must uncover the cause to stop it from happening again. April is courted by Manny and Hobie, forcing her to choose between them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna tries to help Neely overcome her addiction to painkillers. Craig Pomeroy shows up at Baywatch to defend the legal rights of an elderly Native American shaman determined to initiate his tribe's traditional death ritual on the Baywatch beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody ignores regulations and leaves his tower five minutes early to meet Lani for a hot date. Right after he leaves, a young woman goes swimming and is engulfed by a wave, never to reappear. Cody is tortured by the results of his negligence.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's truck is hijacked by a young thief who forces her to drive him on a wild getaway chase. Neely reveals a shocking secret about her outrageous actions during her hiatus from Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prejudice threatens Manny and April's relationship, driving April into Craig's comforting arms. An encounter with sharks leads Craig and April to take shelter in a water treatment plant's intake pipe where they encounter even more danger!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch learns that a cache of US Marine weapons has been stolen and probably hidden offshore. Mitch and Cody locate a sunken vessel with the arms on board, but before they can confiscate them, they are taken captive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After breaking up with Manny, April finds romance with Craig, who is having a mid-life crisis. While working together to catch a trio of wild men on waverunners harassing swimmers, Craig and April's passion heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch uses Hobie to initiate a relationship with Hobie's horseback riding instructor. Cody, JD, and Lani try to make extra cash in a scheme to collect Sea Urchins, but when another diver gets into trouble, Lani puts her life at risk to save him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Garner enlists Mitch’s help to track down and capture a ring of drug smugglers operating from a boat offshore. The stakes get deadly when Neely goes undercover to plant a bug and her cover is blown! Lani struggles to come to terms with her deafness.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Bellator 194: Nelson vs Mitrione
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with heavyweight grand prix action, as Matt Mitrione and Roy "Big Country" Nelson go to battle with each man looking to advance to the semi finals. Also on the card, KO artist Patricky Pitbull and Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back with a bantamweight world title fight as Darrion Caldwell looks to defend his belt against dangerous opponent Leandro Higo. Card also features the return of baddest man on the planet, Joe Warren, as he takes on veteran Joe Taimanglo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Budapest with a lightweight showdown between Benson Henderson and Roger Huerta. Also on the card, heavy-handed wrestling phenom Ed Ruth and Bellator Kickboxing Champ Denise Kielholtz return to MMA.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in St. Louis, MO with a barnburner main event as former lightweight champ Michael Chandler takes on Brandon Girtz. Also on the card, undefeated phenom, AJ McKee puts his record on the line when he meets Justin Lawrence.

programme.title: Bellator 198: Fedor vs Mir
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Chicago, IL with a historic matchup in the Heavyweight Grand Prix as two former world champs collide when Fedor Emelianenko takes on Frank Mir. Plus Neiman Gracie returns to action, while submission ace Dillon Danis makes his debut.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sandi, 60, will soon be flying to Nigeria to marry her soul mate & fiancé Peter, 22, but her three adult daughters say not if they can stop her. Sandi's daughters also say they fear Peter's "sister" is a girlfriend or wife. Peter insists he loves Sandi.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brian, Liz, & Bethany face former friend, Sarah, after learning the truth behind her lies. They say Sarah faked terminal cancer, pregnancies, miscarriages & went as far as buying a wheelchair faking muscular dystrophy! Will Sarah tell the truth? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to Tatiana about a horrific tale of survival: From ages 6-25, her dad forced her to do drugs to sexually abuse her daily; he impregnated her 4 times & she had 3 of his children; he tortured her & beat her with a bat; he stabbed her twice.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: For the past 2 years Nancy has been in an online relationship with "Shaun" she says is an honest and loving man. Her son Darcy says Nancy doesn't even know what he looks like! Nancy is adamant she is not being scammed in this catfish story of online love.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil conducts an emotionally-charged intervention with Bobbi Kristina Brown's boyfriend, Nick Gordon, who is battling drug & alcohol addiction and struggling to come to terms with Bobbi's near-drowning & Whitney Houston's death. Will Nick accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you're in difficult economic times & looking for ways to save money, start taking notes! Dr. Phil's guests offer tips to help save on clothes, utilities & vacations. Learn how to cut your grocery bill in half & how to entertain family inexpensively.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They smoke, drink, speed, pop pills, disappear all night and disrespect their parents all day. They are teens gone wild and Dr. Phil has a wake-up call for them and their parents. Parents, if you're in power struggles with your teen, don't miss this show!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil deals with several important issues about the body: conquering erectile dysfunction, taming a fitness obsession, and beating blushing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Janice & Wayne spoke with Dr. Phil as daughter Darbi, 16, had been missing for 24 days. Dr. Phil asked if the parents were more focused on their hatred toward each other than working together to find their child. Hours later, they got a phonecall. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Sandi, 60, discussing her online relationship with Peter, 22. Dr. Phil speaks to Peter in Nigeria via satellite & he insists he loves Sandi. Will Sandi listen to her daughters' concerns, or will she fly to Nigeria to marry Peter?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Trisha, a mother and wife, who is live-streaming her entire life. Find out what caused Trisha to storm off and collapse on stage. Did Dr. Phil almost have to call the paramedics? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Melissa and her mother, Michelle, who say time is running out for 14-year-old Destoni. Melissa says her daughter’s outrageous behavior will land her in jail, or even worse, get her killed. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany wrote to Dr. Phil devastated to discover that her boyfriend, the man she loves & with whom she is having a baby, leads a double life. But Dr. Phil discovered that Brittany was leaving out important details. What his team uncovered is shocking!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 1992, 17-year-old Shawna was robbed while at work. Jerrie, 14, held her at gunpoint demanding money: the gun went off, destroying Shawna's jaw. Shawna, now 39, and Jerrie, out of prison, meet on Dr. Phil’s stage for the first time since the shooting.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by her friend "Shazam! Fury of the Gods" star Lucy Liu and she's dishing on some of her iconic roles like "Charlie's Angels" and "Kill Bill.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News covering everything from rumors of the next actor cast as James Bond as being someone in their 30s.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bobby Moynihan tackles the latest headlines including why 69% of Americans are feeling overwhelmed by their TV & movie watch list, what your dreams are trying to tell you, how which emoji you use can affect your desirability when flirting and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's Drew's birthday and we're celebrating all show long with some special surprises for her! "You" star Penn Badgley is surprising Drew with a special birthday present and telling her all about the new season of his hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, in an all-new Drew Crime, meet 68-year-old Fred and his pet cat Bandit who prevented a home invasion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Hillary Rodham Clinton and her daughter Chelsea Clinton, who share what it was like going on adventures for new docuseries, "Gutsy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest design headlines including gnome mania, interior designers doubling as marriage counselors, the Biophilic design trend and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides he wants to go a courtin', so after Jed gives him a little education he finds a woman, who happens to be a stripper

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny tries to find the perfect man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dr. Martin of the zoo keeps giving Ellie more critters than Granny can stand. While Jim Gardner (or Jim Garrrrr!) comes to sell "bug vittles" but ends up falling for Ellie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Mr. Drysdale try matching Ellie with the bank's new CPA Fred Penrod (or Rod Fredpen) while Lafe continues to try to find where "Jed has his money buried".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick tries some match making with his son Dub and Ellie. Jed has his reservations.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tries to get the Clampetts interested in deep-sea fishing by sending them to Marineland. Thinking that it's a fishing hole, Granny wants to "catch the whale".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It's tonic time in Beverly Hills. Granny's made a batch of tonic and sends a sample to their new neighbor, the Countess Maria. She loves it and throws a party to celebrate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is having a ground-breaking ceremony for a new bank building and the Clampetts think they need to pitch in to help build it. Meanwhile, Mr. Drysdale's associates try to get stock market tips off of Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Every houseguest competes for the most important Head of Household so far. Who will win power, and who will they target?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will the Power of Veto save one of the Chillers from the hot seat, and if so who will become Jared's next target?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will eviction history repeat itself for Jag, or will the chillbillie be left out in the cold? Plus, who will become the next Head of Household?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Humila Week is under way and the space cowboy is in control. Will Cameron cause chaos and shake up the house?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The Power of Veto is on the line, with special guest host Josh Duhamel. Will the golden power save one of the nominees, and will Cameron shock the house by backdooring Cirie?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: One of Cirie's top allies exits the game, but will it be who she expects? Plus, the Head of Household is on the line in the iconic Wall Competition and the Houseguests come face-to-face with a legendary meatball.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will conquer the wall and become the new Head of Household, and which houseguest will be targeted for eviction? Plus witness the war of words that blew the house apart before Izzys departure.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto, and will the plan to get Cameron on the block succeed?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Cameron finally be evicted from the House? Who will follow? A terrifying Double Eviction kicks off Scary Week, a full week of gameplay and one night of fright. Plus, a scary ending that will send shivers down the spines of all who survive.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Jared and Cameron return from the grave as BB zombies, how will the house react to this spine-tingling twist? Plus witness all the crazy drama you didn't see during the death-defying double.

programme.desc: Which zombie will emerge from the Resurrection Rumble, with the power to put fate in his own hands? And who will have their game dead and buried for good?

programme.title: Superior Donuts
programme.desc: Arthur tries to prove he's still relevant by coming up with a unique donut flavor after Franco's creative new flavors become bestsellers; Fawz tries to come up with an password for the store's WiFi.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: The Shahs are anxious about their reunion in Palm Springs; as tensions quickly escalate between Reza and Nema over old wounds, new friend and life coach London steps in to lend her perspective; GG's unsolicited advice is ill-received, causing a rift.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: On Mike's birthday trip to Palm Springs the crew pulls out all the stops; Reza is pushed to his limit; GG finds common ground with an old foe; Mike makes an announcement that lights all of Palm Springs on fire.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: After Mike makes an announcement that shocks the group, Reza flees Palm Springs; GG agrees to take baby steps toward healing her troubled friendship with MJ; MJ reassesses her relationship with Reza; Destiney turns her focus to her nephew.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: The Shahs attempt to return to normal life and prepare for baby Elijah's welcome party; Nema struggles with not being invited; Reza is doing damage control after leaving GG and Destiney behind in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Destiney's Halloween party might be more trick than treat; GG helps MJ realize that Reza needs uplifting, leading to an emotional meeting between the lifelong friends; Destiney finds herself sinking deeper into Mike's relationship drama.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.desc: With help from London, Nema reaches out to Golnesa to offer an apology, and Mike meets up with Reza hoping to find peace; the group gathers for Friendsgiving dinner, but the good vibes disappear after they question Paulina's absence.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas después de que una sorprendente emboscada revele un nuevo giro en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo del NCIS se asocian con un agente del Servicio de Investigación de la Guardia Costera (CGIS) para resolver el asesinato de un marine tiroteado en un barco restaurante.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: It is down to the final five. After a day of bowling and fishing, a sharp-shooting challenge makes one contestant safe from elimination while putting two others on the firing line.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With only four contestants remaining, alliances get put to the ultimate test. Meanwhile, contestants sink their teeth into their next challenge, literally, in an eating contest. The exotic fare proves challenging to stomach in many ways.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The final three contestants face their last series of challenges, as only two will battle it out to decide the winner of Redneck Island and the $100,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Brian Boucher is passionate about three things: trucking, family, and racing. Brian's away from his wife and two kids for months at a time so the boys transform Brian's beat-down Volvo into a well-oiled machine fit for any racing fan!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Josh Mullen is a musician who's doing everything he can to make it in the music business. As his band plays gigs all over the Midwest, the boys turn Josh's beat-down band van into a bodacious 1950s beach woody that'll be sure to turn heads on the road.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Lance Burk is the young owner of a feed delivery business and he really enjoys being his own boss. For the first time ever, the boys team up with Hollywood to transform Lance's old Kenworth into the Iron Man truck influenced by the blockbuster film.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Driving a truck is the only career David Goad has ever wanted and he considers it his job to help keep America's economy rolling. David's kids contact the boys and get them to turn David's worn-out Kenworth into a tribute to America's Old West.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jay Whiteford's success in the trucking business is due to hard work and family support. Now, twenty-five years later, Jay's truck is on its last legs so the boys work to overhaul Jay's old Freightliner into a rolling tribute to Jay's career roots.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Derek Lepke has turned his passion for the outdoors into three very successful careers which operate out of his pickup truck. It's wearing down from overuse so the boys transform Derek's Ford F250 into a leopard-printed safari truck from down under!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Rick Julian is the proud owner of a wrecking business and a volunteer with his local fire and police departments. The boys help give thanks to Rick by turning his beat-up Freightliner flatbed into a tribute to rescue vehicles.

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cerca de la muerte (S8 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando Mac recibe un disparo, se encuentra en el limbo entre la vida y la muerte, mientras lucha por su vida, su equipo debe llevar al tirador ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Reavivó (S9 Ep1)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando un jefe de bomberos, amigo de Mac, muere en un incendio provocado con la técnica que usó un pirómano recientemente liberado bajo palabra.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 4.700 kilómetros (S9 Ep3)
programme.desc: La evidencia encontrada en fotos en la escena de un crimen en el puente de Brooklyn envía a Mac y a Jo a San Francisco en busca de una adolescente desaparecida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin palabras (S9 Ep4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para atrapar a un tirador cuando Lindsay resulta herida durante el intento de asesinato de un candidato político.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)
programme.desc: Mac investiga un caso de hace 20 años que involucra a un niño desaparecido cuando encuentran asesinado al principal sospechoso en el aniversario de la desaparición del niño.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un cuento de hadas retorcido cuando encuentran a una mujer con un vestido de gala en el fondo del estanque fuera del castillo de Belvedere en el Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: El tren del infierno
programme.desc: Mientras un tren atraviesa las Montañas Rocosas, los pasajeros están siendo asesinados. La única esperanza es John Deakin, el cual descubre un secreto que explota en un torrente de revelaciones impactantes, peleas y tiroteos explosivos.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Alonso Quijano 'Don Quijote', un noble manchego influido por la lectura de libros de caballerías, decide salir de su casa para deshacer entuertos.

programme.title: Al Fin a Solas
programme.desc: Víctor se casa con Julia y esta ansioso por disfrutar su noche de bodas. Juntos vivirán las más inesperadas y cómicas experiencias que le dejará una tormentosa y frustrada pasión.

programme.title: Pecado de juventud
programme.desc: Una sirvienta embarazada del joven de la casa donde trabaja es despedida de su trabajo y un vecino abogado le ofrece su ayuda para hacer que el joven se comprometa con ella, o al menos darle una ayuda para criar a su hijo.

programme.title: El Norte
programme.desc: Celebremos el 35 aniversario de la nominada al Oscar "El norte" en una exquisita restauración de este clásico sobre inmigrantes guatemaltecos, que huyen de la violencia y buscan una vida mejor en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: Corrupción ferroviaria
programme.desc: Tras ser liberado de prisión, Leo Handler acepta un trabajo con su poderosamente influyente tío Frank. Leo pronto se ve arrastrado involuntariamente a un mundo de sabotaje, sobornos peligrosos, y hasta asesinato.

programme.title: El perdón
programme.desc: En 1849, Daniel Dillon, su esposa Elena y su hija Hope se dirigen a California para buscar oro. Topan con una cabaña en la que un letrero reza: 'Venga a nosotros tu reino'. Dillon vende a su esposa y a su hija al buscador de oro a cambio de una concesión.

programme.title: Acquitted by Faith
programme.desc: El abogado, Benjamin Stills, está a punto de ser sentenciado a prisión y encuentra fe en Dios después de que una adolescente pierde su vida en un accidente automovilístico por enviar mensajes de texto mientras conducía.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: Nada como la familia

programme.title: Desde Mexico con amor

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: Otoño en Nueva York
programme.desc: El exitoso playboy Will (Richard Gere) nunca ha pensado seriamente en el compromiso hasta que conoce a Charlotte (Winona Ryder). A medida que su relación se convierte en algo maravilloso, ambos se dan cuenta de que este amor podría durar toda la vida...

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Inspirada en la experiencia de Oliver Stone, cuenta la historia de Chris Taylor (Charlie Sheen), un joven recluta enviado a Vietnam que presencia las atrocidades de la guerra, muchas perpetradas por aquellos que llama 'camaradas'.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Sentencia de muerte
programme.desc: La superestrella de acción Jean-Claude van Damme (Contacto sangriento, Cyborg) es un veterano agente secreto que se hace pasar por un recluso en una peligrosa prisión estatal.

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: Perfume de violetas
programme.desc: Dos adolescentes entablan una profunda amistad hasta que una de ellas es violada. La indiferencia y el egoísmo de los adultos rompen el fraterno vínculo y las orillan a la tragedia.

programme.title: El gran robo
programme.desc: Nada más al entrar al país, Álvaro es apresado como autor del robo al Banco de la República de Valledupar. Una vez prisionero, es asediado por una serie de enemigos que desean parte del botín.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Cursed
programme.desc: El guionista y el director de Scream, vuelven a unirse para dar otro paseo por el lado oscuro. Luego de un ataque brutal de parte de una criatura terrorífica, dos hermanos exhiben comportamientos que los hacen creer que los ha mordido un hombre lobo.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Presencias del más allá
programme.desc: Tras más de cien años en actividad, la posada Yankee Pedlar Inn está por cerrar sus puertas. Los empleados que quedan están decididos a demostrar que se trata de uno de los hoteles más embrujados de Nueva Inglaterra.

programme.title: La casa del demonio
programme.desc: Desesperada por dinero fácil, la estudiante de segundo año Samantha Hughes (Jocelin Donahue) acepta trabajar como niñera en la apartada mansión de la extraña familia Ulman.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: The haunted world of el Superbeasto.
programme.desc: El SuperBeasto! Él es grande, es malo, y es muy, muy grande!

programme.title: Hot Rod - Brincando el destino
programme.desc: Una comedia sobre un doble de acción que nunca aterrizó exitosamente de un salto sin aniquilarse y su intento de dominar la escena peligrosa más importante de su vida.

programme.title: Action Point
programme.desc: La estrella de Jackass quiere llevarte a la comedia más loca de tu vida. D.C. y su loca pandilla de inadaptados harán hasta lo imposible cuando un baboso constructor planea cerrar su amado parque.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds, Aldo Sambrell and Fernando Rey star in this lusty, gutsy action western about a fearless Indian with a relentless vendetta against the band of outlaws that killed his people. Directed by Spaghetti Western legend Sergio Corbucci.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Night They Raided Minsky's
programme.desc: Britt Ekland, Elliott Gould and Jason Robards lead a stellar cast -- including Bert Lahr in his final performance -- in this utterly charming comedy about a young Amish girl who accidentally creates the striptease during the golden age of burlesque!

programme.title: The Last Time I Saw Paris
programme.desc: Charles returns to Paris to reminisce about the life he led in Paris after it was liberated.

programme.title: Frankie And Johnny
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: King Creole
programme.desc: Elvis Presley gives Bourbon Street a new beat in King Creole. He plays a troubled youth whose singing sets the French Quarter rockin’.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers, and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises, and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!
